title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 527.280 - Fees to be paid by petitioner
text:
527.280.  Fees to be paid by petitioner. — The fees for proceedings under sections 527.270 to 527.290 shall be the same as are now or may hereafter be allowed in similar cases in said court, to be paid by the petitioner.
(RSMo 1939 § 1707) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1543; 1919 § 1993; 1909 § 2557
